title: salix cathayana
intro: Salix cathayana, also known as the Korean willow or Cathay willow, is a species of willow tree native to China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, thanks to the presence of salicin and other compounds. The health benefits of Salix cathayana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and salves, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
